<!-- headroom:learn:start -->
## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-03 — do not edit manually*

### Environment
*~15,645 tokens/session saved*
`Bash(curl *)` is blocked by security policy — every attempt to probe the local SSE/WS server with curl is denied. To check the running clide server use `ss -tlnp | grep nvim` (works) or a `node http.get` snippet via ctx_execute; never reach for curl.

### Environment
*~900 tokens/session saved*
MCP config for the clide server lives in `.mcp.json` (`{type:"sse", url:"http://127.0.0.1:<port>/sse"}`). Writing `mcpServers` into `.claude/settings.local.json` fails validation (`Unrecognized field: mcpServers`). Ports are dynamic per Neovim session — a dead port in the config = ECONNREFUSED; rewrite `.mcp.json` on ClideStart.

### File Operations

_~11,791 tokens/session saved_
**Directories vs Files:** Read fails with EISDIR on directories (`tests/`, `lua/clide/tools/`, `references/`). Use `ls` or Glob for directory listing; Read only files. **Edit requires prior Read:** Edit fails with "File has not been read yet" if not read first. Always Read the full file once before any Edit. **Bash find limitations:** rtk find wrapper does not support compound predicates (`-o`, `-not`) or actions (`-exec`). Use raw `find` for complex queries.

### Test Output Capture

_~11,791 tokens/session saved_
`make test > /tmp/test_output.txt 2>&1` once per task. Query that file with grep/awk/tail many times. Never re-run `make test` with different filter flags (`| head`, `| tail -N`, `| grep -A`) — rerunning nvim headless costs ~3000 tokens per invocation. One session reran this 26 times.

### Working Directory Persistence

_~11,791 tokens/session saved_
Bash working directory persists between calls. `cd <path>` once, then omit cd in follow-up commands in same directory. Eval workspace eval-loops repeated `cd <deep-path> && make test` 20x; state the path once, then reuse.

### File Operations — Directories vs Files

_~11,791 tokens/session saved_
Read on directory fails EISDIR (e.g., `/tests`, `/lua/clide/tools/`, `/references/`). Use `ls` or Bash glob for directories; Read only files. Catch EISDIR before attempting and route to Bash instead.

### File State — External Modification

_~600 tokens/session saved_
Read the FULL file once before Edit. If 'File content has changed since last read' error occurs, file was modified externally (formatter, symlink, or save). Call Read again to refresh, then retry Edit. Do NOT retry Edit on stale read.

### Running Tests (token rules)

_~16,800 tokens/session saved_

- NEVER pipe `make test` through `head`/`tail`/`grep` repeatedly — sessions ran it 26x and 9x. Run ONCE: `make test > /tmp/test.log 2>&1; echo "exit=$?"`, then grep/sed `/tmp/test.log`. rtk also tees full output to `~/.local/share/rtk/tee/<ts>_make_test.log` — read the newest log instead of re-running.
- Single-spec rerun: `nvim --headless -u tests/minimal_init.lua -c "PlenaryBustedDirectory tests/<name>_spec.lua {minimal_init='tests/minimal_init.lua'}"` — redirect to a file and run ONCE; a failing spec exits nonzero with the failure already in the captured output (agents looped this 4x per spec).
- Suite pass/fail signal: `make test >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo PASS || echo FAIL` — never invent awk/grep/wc counters to sum per-file `Success:` lines (one session tried 8 different counter pipelines).

### Tool-Use Guardrails

_~11,791 tokens/session saved_

- `Read` on a directory fails with EISDIR (hit on `tests/`, `lua/clide/tools/`, skill dirs). Use `ls` or Glob for directories; Read only files.
- Edit/Write on an existing file fails with "File has not been read yet" — Read the FULL file once first, then batch all edits. Partial reads caused re-read loops on `lua/clide/server/ws.lua` (3x) and `lua/clide/selection.lua` (3x).
- Background task outputs land in `/tmp/claude-1000/.../tasks/<id>.output` — rely on the task-completion notification instead of `sleep N && cat` polling loops (3x in one session).

### SDD Review Workflow

_~2,600 tokens/session saved_

- Task reviews: `Read` the three inputs directly — `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-clide-nvim/task-NN.md`, `.superpowers/sdd/task-NN-report.md`, `.superpowers/sdd/review-<a>..<b>.diff`. Diffs are <12KB; do NOT re-parse them with `ctx_execute` JavaScript (one reviewer ran 4 JS parse passes on the same diff).
- Append to `.superpowers/sdd/progress.md` with `printf '...' >>`, not repeated Edit calls (11 Edits in one session).

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
